_meta.note: Verification ledger for every home rate atom. Integrity SLA: each atom must be re-verified against a real source at least every 30 days. A value snapshot is stored; if the source HTML later differs, the atom is DRIFTED and must be re-verified. Update dates only via `audit_rates.py --mark` after an actual check.

sources.state_avg: Insurance.com home 2026-03-20 ($300k dwelling) — https://www.insurance.com/home-and-renters-insurance/home-insurance-basics/average-homeowners-insurance-rates-by-state (basis differs from our baseline; reconciled by ratio-to-national)
